helpSection1Body: Digital currency is a decentralized digital asset based on blockchain technology, with several features such as a high degree of transparency, support for borderless transactions and tamperability. Currently, the largest digital currencies by market capitalization are bitcoin, ethereum and tether in that order, all of which can be traded on the IRON platform.
helpAboutOverviewBody: IRON is a trading and mining services company headquartered in New York, USA, focused on providing high-performance computing solutions, institutional-grade trading infrastructure, and AI-assisted digital asset services to a global client base.
helpAboutHistoryBody: Since its establishment, IRON has quickly become a leader in digital asset innovation and quantitative trading services. By 2025, we have become a leading brand with over 1 million global users, supported by robust risk controls, transparent operations, and continuous product iteration.
helpAboutServicesBody: High-Performance Trading Platform, Mining Solutions, Quantitative Trading and Risk Management.
helpAboutInnovationBody: IRON continuously explores and applies blockchain technology to enhance transparency and security across our product ecosystem while promoting responsible adoption of digital finance worldwide.
helpAboutOutlookBody: In the future, IRON will continue to expand its influence, deepen strategic partnerships, and deliver secure, compliant, and user-centric financial technology to communities around the world.
helpPrivacy1Body: This Privacy Policy explains how IRON ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information when you access our website, mobile applications, and related services. By using our services, you agree to the practices described in this policy.
helpPrivacy2Body: We may collect information you provide directly (such as name, email, phone number, identity documents, and payment details), information generated through your use of the platform (transaction records, device data, and log files), and information from trusted third-party partners where permitted by law.
helpPrivacy3Body: We use your information to operate and improve our services, verify identity, process transactions, provide customer support, prevent fraud, comply with legal obligations, and communicate important updates about your account or our platform.
helpPrivacy4Title: 4. Sharing, Transfer, and Disclosure of Information
helpPrivacy4Body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with service providers, regulatory authorities, or affiliated entities only when necessary for service delivery, legal compliance, or with your explicit consent, subject to appropriate safeguards.
helpPrivacy5Body: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data, withdraw consent, or request data portability. Contact us to exercise these rights.
helpPrivacy6Body: We implement administrative, technical, and organizational measures including encryption, access controls, monitoring, and staff training to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, or disclosure.
helpPrivacy7Body: Personal data is stored on secure servers with retention periods aligned to legal requirements and business needs. When data is no longer required, we securely delete or anonymize it.
helpPrivacy8Body: We use cookies and similar technologies to maintain sessions, remember preferences, analyze traffic, and improve user experience. You may manage cookie settings through your browser or device controls.
helpPrivacy9Body: Our platform may link to or integrate third-party services. Those providers have their own privacy policies, and we encourage you to review them before sharing information.
helpPrivacy10Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated through the platform or by email. Continued use after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
helpPrivacy11Body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at admin@iron.com.
helpAffiliateIntro: Earn up to 5% commission on trading volume. Designed for influencers, bloggers, and community leaders.
helpAffiliateWhyBody: Partner with IRON to monetize your audience through a transparent, performance-based referral model with real-time tracking, dedicated support, and scalable rewards as your network grows.
helpAffiliateHowBody: Register as an affiliate, receive your unique referral link or code, and invite users to join IRON. Qualified activity from your referrals contributes to your commission tier according to program rules.
helpAffiliateRulesBody: Affiliates must promote IRON honestly, comply with applicable laws, avoid spam or misleading claims, and refrain from self-referral abuse or market manipulation. Violations may result in suspension and forfeiture of rewards.
helpAffiliateRewardsBody: Rewards are distributed based on verified trading volume and active network participation across eligible generations. Higher tiers unlock enhanced commission rates as defined in the current affiliate schedule.
helpAffiliateFaqBody: Commission payouts are processed according to platform settlement cycles. For payout timing, eligibility, and tier requirements, refer to your affiliate dashboard or contact support for the latest program terms.
helpLicenseCard1Body: Enterprise-grade safeguards protect user assets and data across trading, custody, and account operations.
helpLicenseCard2Body: Clear policies, auditable processes, and regulatory alignment underpin every layer of our service delivery.
helpLicenseCard3Body: Licensed structures and verified registrations reinforce confidence for our global user community.
helpLicenseFootnote: New York, USA. Registered with the New York Department of State, ensuring legal and compliant operations. DOS ID: 7374016. Holder of the U.S. FinCEN (MSB) financial license. Certificate No.: 31000294614116.
